summary: The user is seeking recommendations for interactive toys to help their cat, Luna, exercise and lose weight. They recently purchased a new pet bed for Luna from Chewy.com, which she loves. The session includes tips on hiding treats around the house to encourage Luna's natural hunting behavior and suggestions for suitable treats to use during this activity.
facts: The user has a cat named Luna.
The user recently bought a new pet bed for Luna from Chewy.com.
The user plans to use freeze-dried chicken strips as treats for Luna's food hunting game.
The user intends to start by hiding 2-3 freeze-dried chicken strips in plain sight for Luna.
The user is interested in interactive toys that can help Luna exercise and lose weight.
The user is looking for ways to make hiding treats more challenging and fun for Luna.
The user is advised to store freeze-dried chicken strips in an airtight container or ziplock bag to keep them fresh.
The user is encouraged to observe Luna's behavior during the food hunting game and adjust the number of hidden treats accordingly.
The user is advised to keep freeze-dried chicken strips away from strong-smelling foods to prevent odor absorption.
The user is informed that freeze-dried chicken strips should ideally be used within 2-3 months of opening for optimal freshness.
The user is recommended to start hiding treats in easy-to-find locations and gradually increase the difficulty as Luna becomes more confident.
The user is advised to monitor Luna's reactions and adjust the game based on her interest and engagement.
